data.body:
Relevant ticket details:

JIRA ISSUES WITH NO LOCAL COUNTERPART:
- DIG-1546 (Bug/To Do): 'Jira is not updated with in progress epics, stories, or tasks'
  - Description: null (no description body in Jira)
  - Assignee: null
  - Created in Jira, never synced inbound
- DIG-1547 (Bug/To Do): 'DIG-1470 is still shown as in progress in Jira'
  - Description: null
  - Assignee: null
  - Created in Jira, never synced inbound
- DIG-1548 (Bug/To Do): 'Jira failures are not surfaced to the user when bridge operations fail'
  - Description: null
  - Assignee: null
  - Created in Jira, never synced inbound

LOCAL SEARCH (3247 tickets including archived): zero matches by bridge_key reference or title substring for any of these 3 Jira keys.

RELATED: The Inbound Bridge had 3 push failures in the last week (bug d411-c0e7) due to concurrent tickets branch updates. However, these 3 Jira bugs likely predate those failures — they appear to have never been candidates for inbound sync at all.
